top20.note: Strong operational progress, acquisitions, and backlog fueling bullish space sector discussion.

Discussion centers on Medicare access expansion starting July and long-term GLP-1 obesity opportunity amid competition from Lilly and generics.
Platform updates including age-gating tests and new gift features generate strong user engagement.
